intents: pull up the messages in chat {chat_id}

args.value: SELECT * FROM messages WHERE chat_id = $1 ORDER BY created_at

args.value: SELECT * FROM appointments WHERE DATE(start_time) = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY start_time

intents: get reviews with rating greater than {rating}

args.name: sql
args.value: SELECT * FROM reviews WHERE rating > $1 ORDER BY rating DESC

args.value: SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE user_id = $1 AND read = false ORDER BY created_at DESC

intents: show who user {user_id} is connected with

args.name: sql
args.value: SELECT * FROM connections WHERE (requester_id = $1 OR recipient_id = $1) AND status = 'accepted'

intents: insert a new user with name {name} and phone {phone}

args.name: sql
args.value: INSERT INTO users (name, phone) VALUES ($1, $2)

intents: update the status of appointment {id} to {status}

args.name: sql
args.value: UPDATE appointments SET status = $1 WHERE id = $2

intents: remove old sessions from the database

args.name: sql
args.value: DELETE FROM devices WHERE last_active < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

intents: delete cancelled appointments older than {days} days
remove appointments that were cancelled more than {days} days ago
clean up cancelled appointments older than {days} days
purge old cancelled appointments past {days} days

args.name: sql
args.value: DELETE FROM appointments WHERE status = 'cancelled' AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '$1 days'
